sentences.text: Thank you for calling Cornerstone your call may be recorded for quality assurance purposes. If you are a current or past resident please press one. If you have a question about leasing a new apartment please press two. If you are calling to submit a work order please press three. If you are a current client are interested in our Services, please press four for all other inquiries, please press five. If you know, the extension you are trying to reach please dial it. Now to repeat the menu please. If you are calling about a rental verification please press one for anything else. Please stay on the line to return to the previous menu please press pound. Telecom, how can I help you.

Hi, you've reached Jake Smith with Cornerstone apartment Services my business hours are from eight thirty to five thirty Monday through Friday. If you reach this message during those hours I'm either away from the phone or on the other line. Please leave a message and I'll return your call by the end of the next business day, thanks and have a great day. Please leave a message at the tone when finished you may hang up or press pound for additional options.
Ahead and transfer you thank you.
